name: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Linux Shell Spawned by a Process
notes:
Detects a Shell spawned from a process, which is unlikely. 

Note: Populate the reference set "Whitelisted Linux Processes" to whitelist processes that are allowed to spawn new linux shells.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Linux Shell Spawned by a Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Login Shell Filename - AlphaNumeric
when any of Parent Process Path (custom) are contained in any of Whitelisted Linux Processes - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviourDefinition: Linux Shell Spawned by a Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Login Shell Filename - AlphaNumeric
AND NOT when any of Parent Process Path (custom) are contained in any of Whitelisted Linux Processes - AlphaNumeric
